content.body:
> <@nicolo-ribaudo:matrix.org> ljharb I was wondering, would it be possible to create a GitHub action that merges PRs "the right way"? So that for those that do not have conflicts, the "ready to merge" label could work automatically without you having to do it manually

I’m sure we can get that done
content.formatted_body:
In reply to @nicolo-ribaudo:matrix.org
ljharb I was wondering, would it be possible to create a GitHub action that merges PRs "the right way"? So that for those that do not have conflicts, the "ready to merge" label could work automatically without you having to do it manually
I’m sure we can get that done
